title: Can we please make it possible to add subtask items to subtask items?
excerpt: I’d really love if it were possible to add subtasks to subtasks. It would really help my team and I break down initiatives into more steps. Sometimes, an initiative is comprised of other smaller initiatives that can be b…

posts.author: mbaumanlbd2c (Matt Bauman)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’d really love if it were possible to add subtasks to subtasks. It would really help my team and I break down initiatives into more steps. Sometimes, an initiative is comprised of other smaller initiatives that can be broken down into more steps. It’d be great if everything involved in one main initiative could be formatted within the same main initiative with subtasks.

Are there any plans to make this possible in the future?

posts.author: Varshna (Varshna Goelels)
posts.cookedHtml: Would love this idea - need to create subitems that actually belong to the subitem above. Need to keep them in the correct order within the subitem list - which is a pain. Hope this gets more votes.

posts.author: jchuprun (Jennifer Chuprun)
posts.cookedHtml: Subtasks under subtasks would make our project management team very happy. We have campaign and we use subtasks for all the deliverable under one job. However each deliverable has several tasks, currently it’s a challenge to mange the workflow with only one subtask.
